- [Youth Boop da Snoot classic tee](https://artistryvibes.com/products/youth-boop-da-snoot-classic-tee): Investing in the youth classic tee means investing in a wardrobe staple that effortlessly combines quality, affordability, and versatility. Elevate your kids’ wardrobes with a t-shirt that keeps up with their adventures. • 100% cotton • Sport Grey is 90% cotton, 10% polyester • Fabric weight: 5.3 oz./yd² (180 g/m²) • Pre-shrunk fabric • Classic fit • Taped neck and shoulders • Tear-away tag • Made with OEKO-TEX  low-impact dyes • Blank product sourced from the Dominican Republic, Honduras, Haiti, Nicaragua, or El Salvador Disclaimer: Due to the fabric properties, the White color variant may appear off-white rather than bright white. This product is made especially for you as soon as you place an order, which is why it takes us a bit longer to deliver it to you. Making products on demand instead of in bulk helps reduce overproduction, so thank you for making thoughtful purchasing decisions!

- [Youth Embrace Our Differences classic tee](https://artistryvibes.com/products/youth-embrace-our-differences-classic-tee): Investing in the youth classic tee means investing in a wardrobe staple that effortlessly combines quality, affordability, and versatility. Elevate your kids’ wardrobes with a t-shirt that keeps up with their adventures. • 100% cotton • Sport Grey is 90% cotton, 10% polyester • Fabric weight: 5.3 oz./yd² (180 g/m²) • Pre-shrunk fabric • Classic fit • Taped neck and shoulders • Tear-away tag • Made with OEKO-TEX  low-impact dyes • Blank product sourced from the Dominican Republic, Honduras, Haiti, Nicaragua, or El Salvador Disclaimer: Due to the fabric properties, the White color variant may appear off-white rather than bright white. This product is made especially for you as soon as you place an order, which is why it takes us a bit longer to deliver it to you. Making products on demand instead of in bulk helps reduce overproduction, so thank you for making thoughtful purchasing decisions!

- [Youth Corgi Cupcake classic tee](https://artistryvibes.com/products/youth-corgi-cupcake-classic-tee): Investing in the youth classic tee means investing in a wardrobe staple that effortlessly combines quality, affordability, and versatility. Elevate your kids’ wardrobes with a t-shirt that keeps up with their adventures. • 100% cotton • Sport Grey is 90% cotton, 10% polyester • Fabric weight: 5.3 oz./yd² (180 g/m²) • Pre-shrunk fabric • Classic fit • Taped neck and shoulders • Tear-away tag • Made with OEKO-TEX  low-impact dyes • Blank product sourced from the Dominican Republic, Honduras, Haiti, Nicaragua, or El Salvador Disclaimer: Due to the fabric properties, the White color variant may appear off-white rather than bright white. This product is made especially for you as soon as you place an order, which is why it takes us a bit longer to deliver it to you. Making products on demand instead of in bulk helps reduce overproduction, so thank you for making thoughtful purchasing decisions!

- [Burbank Kung Fu Club Unisex classic tee](https://artistryvibes.com/products/burbank-kung-fu-club-unisex-classic-tee): The 100% cotton unisex classic tee will help you land a more structured look. It sits nicely, maintains sharp lines around the edges, and goes perfectly with layered streetwear outfits. Plus, it's extra trendy now! • 100% cotton • Sport Grey is 90% cotton, 10% polyester • Ash Grey is 99% cotton, 1% polyester • Heather colors are 50% cotton, 50% polyester • Fabric weight: 5.0–5.3 oz/yd² (170-180 g/m²) • Open-end yarn • Tubular fabric • Taped neck and shoulders • Double seam at sleeves and bottom hem • Blank product sourced from Honduras, Nicaragua, Haiti, Dominican Republic, Bangladesh, Mexico Disclaimers: • Due to the fabric properties, the White color variant may appear off-white rather than bright white. • Dark color speckles throughout the fabric are expected for the color Natural. This product is made especially for you as soon as you place an order, which is why it takes us a bit longer to deliver it to you. Making products on demand instead of in bulk helps reduce overproduction, so thank you for making thoughtful purchasing decisions!

- [Funny ‘It’s Fine. Everything Is Fine.’ Raccoon Trash Can Mouse Pad](https://artistryvibes.com/products/funny-it-s-fine-everything-is-fine-raccoon-trash-can-mouse-pad): Bright, playful mouse pad designed to bring a wry smile to your desk. The smooth, full-color surface showcases a cheeky raccoon sitting in a flaming trash can with the caption “It’s fine. Everything is fine.” Colors stay vivid thanks to full-front decoration, while the high-density foam core and thin rubber base give steady support and effortless mouse gliding. Rounded rectangular shape and one-sided print make it a simple, functional accent for workstations, gaming setups, or study nooks — a little chaotic charm to ease the tension during long sessions.Product features- Smooth surface for effortless mouse gliding and easy cleaning- Full-front decoration with bright, intense colors- Rubber base keeps pad firmly gripped to the desk- Durable high-density foam with ultra-thin rubber base (1/16" thick)- Rectangular shape with one-sided printCare instructions- Use warm water and dish soap to clean spots off your pad. It's not necessary to soak the whole pad. For hard-to-clean spots use a soft-bristled brush.

- [Mouse Pad — "Introverted But Willing to Discuss Cats" Cute Cat Lover Desk Mat](https://artistryvibes.com/products/mouse-pad-introverted-but-willing-to-discuss-cats-cute-cat-lover-desk-mat): A soft, low-profile mouse pad that brings a little personality to your desk. The smooth fabric surface lets your mouse glide with ease while the thin, gripped rubber base keeps everything steady during focused work or casual browsing. Lightweight and wipe-clean, this rectangular pad slips into any setup and quietly announces: you prefer quiet days and good cat talk.Product features- Smooth fabric surface for effortless mouse gliding and easy cleaning- Vibrant full-front print with bright, long-lasting colors- Non-slip rubber base keeps the pad firmly in place on your desk- Durable, high-density foam core with an ultra-thin 1/16" profile- One-sided print on a rectangular shapeCare instructions- Use warm water and dish soap to clean spots off your pad. It's not necessary to soak the whole pad. For hard-to-clean spots use a soft-bristled brush.

- [Alien Cat Crewneck Sweatshirt](https://artistryvibes.com/products/alien-cat-crewneck-sweatshirt): Soft, slightly oversized, and quietly strange — this crewneck brings a little late-night magic to everyday wear. The fabric feels substantial without being stiff, with ribbed collar and cuff that keep shape after washes. Little details like tubular construction (no side seams) and double-needle stitching mean it wears like a favorite that will stick around. It’s something you reach for when you want comfort with personality — for slow evenings, moonlit walks, small-group game nights, or just lounging while you read or sketch.Designed for grown-up wardrobes but with a playful, artful energy. The embroidery option and DTF inner neck label make it customizable and gift-ready; ethically sourced cotton and OEKO-TEX dyes give it a cleaner footprint. If you collect cozy pieces that also speak to your offbeat aesthetic, this sweatshirt slides right into rotation.Product features- Medium-heavy 50/50 cotton-poly blend (8.0 oz/yd²) for durable, comfortable warmth- Tubular knit (no side seams) and double-needle stitching for a clean look and long-lasting wear- Ribbed knit collar with seam and elastic cuffs to retain shape- Embroidered decoration available on left/center chest or wrists; DTF inner neck labels and wrist prints- Ethically sourced US cotton, OEKO-TEX  dyes; meets safety and environmental standardsCare instructions- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)- Non-chlorine: bleach as needed- Tumble dry: low heat- Do not dryclean-

- [All-Over Print Tee — Vintage Flower and Hummingbird Pattern](https://artistryvibes.com/products/all-over-print-tee-vintage-flower-and-hummingbird-pattern): A soft, all-over printed tee that reads like a wearable daydream. Lightweight polyester with a gentle lilac background is covered in tiny bouquets of watercolor roses and blue blossoms, giving the shirt a vintage-fresh look that moves easily from morning coffee to garden strolls. The cut and sewn shape flatters the waist without clinging, while the ribbed collar and shoulder tape keep the silhouette neat through wear and wash. It feels feminine without fuss — the kind of top you reach for when you want to look put-together but still feel comfortable and light.This tee suits people who love slow mornings, cottagecore aesthetics, and floral details that feel hand-painted rather than mass-produced. It layers well under a denim jacket or stands alone with high-waisted jeans or a linen skirt. Bring it to spring markets, picnics, weekend visits to botanical gardens, or any day you want a little floral calm in your wardrobe.Product features- 100% polyester fabric that holds color and dries quickly- Side seams for improved shape and structural support- Ribbed knit collar with seam for lasting elasticity- Shoulder tape to stabilize seams and prevent stretching- Available in two fabric weights (113 g/m² and 170 g/m²); regular fit, tagless, true to sizeCare instructions- Do not dryclean- Do not iron- Tumble dry: low heat- Do not bleach- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)

- [Floral Watercolor All-Over Print Women's Tee](https://artistryvibes.com/products/floral-watercolor-all-over-print-womens-tee): Soft, painterly roses sweep across a blush background, turning a simple tee into a wearable bouquet. Lightweight polyester keeps the watercolor blooms vivid and the fit smooth, so the print reads like an original painting whether you're out for coffee or arranging flowers at home. The ribbed collar and shoulder tape give structure that moves with you, while the side seams keep the shape flattering after repeated wear. Wear it with denim or a linen skirt for relaxed afternoons, or layer under a cardigan for garden visits and springtime gatherings. This tee feels like a quiet, floral moment you can carry with you.Product features- 100% polyester fabric—durable, shape-retaining, quick-drying- Side seams for improved structure and a longer-lasting fit- Ribbed knit collar with seam for stretch and shape retention- Shoulder tape stabilizes seams and prevents stretching- Available in two fabric weights (113 g/m² or 170 g/m²); tagless and runs true to sizeCare instructions- Do not dryclean- Do not iron- Tumble dry: low heat- Do not bleach- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)

- [Corgi Balloon Spiral Journal — Cute Paw Print Notebook](https://artistryvibes.com/products/corgi-balloon-spiral-journal-cute-paw-print-notebook): Carry a little whimsy wherever you go with this spiral journal. Soft blush pages peek beneath a semi-gloss cover illustrated with a watercolor corgi drifting on a heart-shaped balloon, set against playful paw prints. The 160-page, lined interior invites everyday thoughts, lists, and sketches, while the sturdy spiral binding keeps the book open and easy to write in. Bright, long-lasting printing makes the cover illustration sing, and a durable black back cover protects your notes from wear.This journal feels like a quiet, cheerful companion—perfect for those who love dogs, gentle art, and slow mornings with a pen in hand. It slips into tote bags and backpacks, ready for dog-walk reflections, quick sketches between classes, or a flurry of to-dos before bed. The light-hearted design brings a smile each time you open it and keeps your notes safe and tidy for days when you need a little extra warmth.Product features- 160 pages (80 sheets) of lined 90gsm paper — smooth, easy-to-write pages- Semi-gloss laminated front cover for a durable, smooth finish- Vibrant, high-quality printing that preserves watercolor detail- Sturdy spiral binding and black back cover for durability and ease of use- REACH ; intended for  useCare instructions- Use a soft, clean and dry cloth to gently brush any dust or dirt off from the center of book outwards.
